{{CargoOrgan
|name=True Eye of Sealing
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10721
|idx=79
|description="Countless heroes have fallen on the path to slay the demon. They braved death without fear. But when they met that gaze... they laid down their swords in hopeless surrender."
— Demon King's Revelation
|skill=Before round start, intimidate the opponent with a gaze, reducing the enemy's DEF by 60% this round!
|hp=2120
|def=373
|atk=242
|rush=243
|gene1=Per Xenoking Organ implanted, {race} DEF +42
Xenoking Organs implanted: 7/7
|gene2=Snail Arena, All ELMT DMG +2%
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} DEF +140
|gene4=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene5=Earth RES +120
|gene6=Snail Arena, enemy HP Regen -24%
|gene7=Earth RES +6% (Awakened)
|}}
